# Kevin Kuhn

> AI-Powered Strategic Intelligence | Founder @ Gopf | University Lecturer | Board Member

Kevin Kuhn is a Swiss entrepreneur, university lecturer, and founder of Gopf – Strategic Intelligence. He helps companies make sense of data through applied research, ideation, and education. He lectures at HWZ Zurich and HSLU Lucerne.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.kevinkuhn.ch/): Bio, engagement history, and education
- [Experiences](https://www.kevinkuhn.ch/experiences.html): Projects including Semantic Similarity Map, Datenstrategie, Brauer AI, and more
- [Contact](https://www.kevinkuhn.ch/contact.html): Email, phone, Calendly booking, LinkedIn
- [Snippets](https://www.kevinkuhn.ch/snippets.html): 58 articles on data science, AI, strategic intelligence, and entrepreneurship

## Topics

- Strategic Intelligence & Competitive Analysis
- Data Science & Machine Learning
- AI in Manufacturing & Public Sector
- Entrepreneurship & Startup Building
- University Lecturing (EMBA, Data & AI)
- Board Membership (Energy Sector)

## Key Projects

- Gopf – Strategic Intelligence (gopf.com): AI-powered market intelligence platform
- Semantic Similarity Map: Visual document similarity analysis
- Brauer AI: First Swiss IPA brewed from an AI-generated recipe

## Contact

- Email: hello@kevinkuhn.ch
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kuhnkevin/
